image:image.image:caption: Handmade Scrappy Doll by Kanda Kay with multicolored yarn hair, embroidered features, and a vibrant patchwork dress with lace trim.
A wall display of dozens of handmade Scrappy Dolls by Kanda Kay.
Handmade Scrappy Doll with curly brown hair, a poppy headband, and a green floral dress.
Scrappy Doll with yellow yarn hair, a burlap face, and a patterned orange dress.
Scrappy Doll with multicolored yarn hair and a vibrant patchwork dress with lace trim.
Scrappy Doll wearing a Route 66 Motel Court t-shirt with black yarn pigtails.
Patriotic Scrappy Doll in red, white, and blue with a star headband and beaded jewelry.
Scrappy Doll with black curly yarn hair and an orange and blue speckled dress.
Handmade owl Scrappy Doll in blue tweed fabric with burlap eyes and a felt beak.
A pair of mouse-eared Scrappy Dolls — one in plaid, one in green floral.
Two handmade Scrappy Dog Dolls — a brown puppy and a tan terrier with button eyes.
